primary_diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia of the B-cell lineage (common B-ALL)
blood count before start of treatment: L 0,41/nl, Hb 9,1g/dl, T 33/nl, LDH 198U/l
BM cytology: 79% blasts
FACS: CD45-, SSC low, CD34 low, CD19+, CD20+, CD22+, Tdt+, CD10+, CD38+; 89% the CD45+
cells
Molecular genetics: BCR-ABL negative, IDH1 positive
Cytogenetics: 46,XY[1] normal male karyotype (findings with limited interpretive
value)
FISH: biallelic Deletion 9p21 (nullisomy), gain of chromosomal regions 9q22 and 9q34
as well as in the subclone on tumor cells with gain of chromosomal region 5q32q33
question: Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
raw_vignette:
Age: 64
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia of the B-cell lineage (common B-ALL)
blood count before start of treatment: L 0,41/nl, Hb 9,1g/dl, T 33/nl, LDH 198U/l
BM cytology: 79% blasts
FACS: CD45-, SSC low, CD34 low, CD19+, CD20+, CD22+, Tdt+, CD10+, CD38+; 89% the CD45+
cells
Molecular genetics: BCR-ABL negative, IDH1 positive
Cytogenetics: 46,XY[1] normal male karyotype (findings with limited interpretive
value)
FISH: biallelic Deletion 9p21 (nullisomy), gain of chromosomal regions 9q22 and 9q34
as well as in the subclone on tumor cells with gain of chromosomal region 5q32q33
Secondary diagnoses:
History of appendectomy
Type 2 diabetes mellitus
Arterial hypertension
Treatment and course:
Molecular genetic findings
Question for the tumor board:
Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
Tumor board decision:
Targeted Therapy with Ivosidenib (+Azacitidin).
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
21.06.2023 BM diagnostics: Cytology 71% blasts. FACS: B-Vorläufer-ALL (CD19+, CD10+,
TdT+, CD22+, CD20+; CD34 low; CD45-/low, SSC low), ~89% the CD45+ cells. Cytogenetics:
46,XY (unauff.). FISH:ED common B-ALL
26.06.2023 Pre-phase (analogous GMALL >55 J): Dexamethason d1-5; Cyclophosphamid d3-5;
IT MTX 12 mg
30.06.2023 CSF (i.R. Pre-phase): IT MTX 12 mg. Cytology 2 cells; FACS 1,3% BlastenIT
Triple to blast clearance
01.07.2023 Cycle 1 Inotuzumab-Ozogamicin (analogous INITAL-1; d1 0,8 mg/m2, d8+d15 0,5
mg/m2)
06.07.-14.07.2023 3x Lumbar puncture + IT Triple (to blast clearance)
19.07.2023 BMA Remission assessment: Zytol. 2% blasts; MRD (FACS) neg.; MRD (Kiel)
neg.
26.07.2023 Cycle 2 Inotuzumab-Ozogamicin
16.08.2023 BMA: Zytol. 3% blasts; MRD (FACS) neg.; MRD (Kiel) neg.
22.08.2023 Cycle 3 Inotuzumab-Ozogamicin
12.09.2023 BMA: Zytol. 3% blasts; MRD (FACS) neg.; MRD (Kiel) neg.
27.09.2023 IT Triple (Prophylaxe/Maintenance)
03.10.2023 Course: Platelets 65/nl; Maintenance with MTX + 6-MP yet not started
(cytopenia)
08.11.2023 Persistent thrombocytopenia ~60/nl; MRD (Kiel) negative
28.11.2023 BM: cytol. ~38% precursor cells; FACS: precursor cells of various
maturation stages; MRD (Kiel) negative
09.01.2024 BM: cytol. ~22% precursor cells; FACS: precursor cells of various
maturation stages; MRD (Kiel) negative
14.05.2024 Progressive cytopenia: Plt 28/nl, Hb 9,6 g/dl, WBC 1,28/nl, Neutro 0,5/nl.
BM: signs of dysplasia granulopoiesis/megakaryopoiesis (~10%), 8% blasts. FACS: 2,5%
lymphoid blasts (LAIP wie ED) + 0,7% myeloid blasts unremarkable. IDH1 AF ~42%. MRD

(Kiel) pending
